prompt: Convert this radiology passage into both cloze and basic Anki flashcards. Prioritize differentiating features between hemangioma and metastasis.

assertions.name: max_2_cloze_per_card
assertions.description: No more than 2 cloze deletions per card

assertions.name: no_trivial_cloze
assertions.description: No cloze hides single stop words or obvious-from-context terms

assertions.name: differentiation_priority
assertions.description: Cards emphasize hemangioma vs metastasis differentiating features
